name: Unusual Number of Devices Logged on by Same User
notes: This rule triggers when the same user seems to log on an abnormal number of devices within a short period of time.
conditions_text: when the event matches Username is not N/A
when any of Username are contained in any of (Shared) BDFC - Service Accounts - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success
when at least 20 events are seen with the same Username, Source IP and different Log Source in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 20 events are seen with the same Username, Source IP and different Log Source in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY Unusual Number of Devices Logged on by Same User on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches Username is not N/A
AND when any of Username are contained in any of (Shared) BDFC - Service Accounts - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success
AND when at least 20 events are seen with the same Username, Source IP and different Log Source in 1 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: Unusual Number of Devices Logged on by Same User
Event description: Detects when the same user seems to log on an abnormal number of devices within a short period of time.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
